form.title: Publishing Form
form.subtitle: Fill out the fields below to send your publishing request.

placeholders.name: Your full name
placeholders.synopsis: Briefly describe the story or concept of your work
placeholders.message: Tell us more about your work and why you want to publish it with us

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.workTitleMin: Title must be at least 2 characters.
errors.synopsisMin: Synopsis must be at least 10 characters.
errors.synopsisMax: Synopsis must be at most 2000 characters.
errors.portfolioLinkInvalid: Invalid URL. Use the http:// or https:// format
errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters.
errors.messageMax: Message must be at most 5000 characters.

toasts.validationFailed: Please fix the errors in the form.
